passes.gate: Generated profile uses --replace config, profile-local user-data/data-local, and no unrelated game content.
Every configured archive is present, listable, and classified by path family.
Every content file has record counts and parse failures are explicit ledger rows.
Every known interior and exterior cell/grid has a stable id and reference counts.
Real OpenMW native screenshots and logs prove representative cells load without profile contamination.
Every referenced mesh, texture, material, animation, sound, voice, UI, and video path is resolved or classified.
Every placed actor maps to base actor, skeleton, model parts, face/head data, equipment, animation roots, and voice/material expectations.
Curated actor classes render from real cells with no zero-geometry, one-color, or magenta fallback evidence.
Exterior grids and door-linked interiors are covered by slices with crash/missing/visual failures logged.
The current pass stays green after the proposed fix and before VR or next-world promotion.

guardrails: Real native OpenMW screenshots are baseline evidence; synthetic screenshots are diagnostic only.
Starfield and Fallout 76 stay asset-research until this contract is deliberately updated.
No Starfield-specific change is promoted unless Morrowind and the current ESM4 baseline still pass.
A screenshot without a manifest, log, and failure classification is not accepted as proof.
